violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Employee states took test and did not receive certificate.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee did not wash hands when changing task from bar area to food area.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. 2 refrigerators had food items not labeled with product and date. Such as pizza beef, ham etc.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
